description:
I’m Babu, a passionate software engineer who believes every problem has a solution… unless it’s caused by a missing semicolon or a production issue on a Friday evening.

I enjoy building software, learning new technologies, and finding smarter ways to automate everyday tasks. I’m always curious about what’s next in the tech world, whether it’s AI, cloud computing, or the latest framework everyone suddenly claims is “the future.”

My biggest dream is to become an entrepreneur someday. I want to build products that people genuinely love to use and create something that makes a real impact. Every side project is a step toward that goal—even if a few of them end up as “work in progress” forever.

Outside of work, I enjoy exploring new ideas, solving interesting challenges, and convincing myself that this weekend is finally the one where I’ll finish all my personal projects. (Spoiler: I usually start three new ones instead.)

I believe success comes from staying curious, learning continuously, and never being afraid to try something new. If you’re into technology, innovation, startups, or just enjoy a good debugging story, let’s connect. Who knows? Our next conversation might turn into the next big startup… or at least a great coffee chat.
